description_long: This is a standard-sized aluminum beer can with a vibrant, deep blue background and striking graphic artwork. The main illustration features a large, detailed pink jellyfish with long, flowing tentacles, surrounded by bubbles and stylized aquatic elements. The can is covered in bold, white and light blue typography, with product details such as 'STING' and 'CHOCOLATE & SALTED CARAMEL STOUT' prominently displayed. The back of the can includes nutritional and legal information, a barcode, and playful text, along with a cartoon pig character. The surface appears smooth and slightly glossy, typical of printed aluminum cans. The can holds 330ml of beer and is designed to be both eye-catching and informative.
description: A blue aluminum beer can with a vivid jellyfish illustration, bold white text, and playful graphic details. The can features smooth, glossy surfaces and detailed product information.
description_view_0: Front view showing the large pink jellyfish illustration, tentacles, and the ABV label on a blue background.
description_view_1: Rear-left view displaying the cartoon pig, playful text, and product information including the hashtag and allergen details.
description_view_2: Rear view with prominent 'STING' text, website, barcode, and detailed product description.
description_view_3: Front-right view highlighting the jellyfish head, tentacles, and the 'CHOCOLATE & SALTED CARAMEL STOUT' text.
attribute_graphic_design: The label features a bold, colorful illustration of a pink jellyfish with flowing tentacles on a deep blue background, accented by bubbles and aquatic motifs. Typography is large and white, with playful and modern fonts, and the overall design is vibrant and eye-catching.
